ūüíį. 25c Kelly Black Hardware
Size: 13*19*7cm
25c Spring/Summer, a new Kelly color is out. Not only clothes, but bags have great designs too. But I have to say, the bag is really amazing. It feels like my wallet can't hold it. As a design inspiration, Kelly is elegant yet gentle. The vintage replica has a strong French retro feel. I really love it!
Style No. AS4416

items.name_en: ūüíį. In Stock Chanel 24A Kelly
items.name_cn:
ūüíį. In Stock Chanel 24A Kelly
Size: 19*13*7cm
24A Kelly Burgundy, it's really cute to me. This season's most requested, another vintage fashion cycle bag. The 1997 Kelly returns with a chain this time, vintage yet stylish. The 'King of Bags' lives up to its name. Handheld or crossbody, it's all good. Very lightweight with a rich vintage taste, just right. It's a '23k Bag King' worthy of the title. The large size isn't too big; it fits an iPhone Pro but is a bit tight for the Max. Exquisite but not bulky. The interior capacity is sufficient for daily use. The more you look at it, the more you like it. Can't resist the girly heart. Comparison of the two sizes' appeal.
Style No. AS4416

items.name_en: ūüĒģūüĒģūüĒģOHANELūüö©ūüö©ūüö©Vintage Calfskin Custom Leather, super retro in person. My favorite autumn/winter suede Chanel. It's firmly number one in my heart because it's so unique and rare. Chocolate brown with double pockets and a chain strap. This was the first Chanel that attracted me to the brand. It gathers all the suede styles I love. Crossbody tote, adjustable chain ‚õďÔłŹ. These five major elements appear in many similar styles, but this suede brown is the one that hits me the most. The leather looks like cowhide texture but feels like thick matte suede. The chain allows for a shoulder bag style. Lightweight, fits a laptop + iPad! Dimensions: 28x12.5x24cm
